title: Unforgettable
lyrics:
🎵
🎵 Debatable, unforgettable, debatable, yeah unforgettable 🎵
🎵 See perception is kindness, perception is your mind, perception is you, understanding you, yeah 🎵
🎵 Unforgettable, can you forget you? For just one day, yeah yeah yeah 🎵
🎵 Unforgettable, BE unforgettable and behave in your way 🎵
🎵lights, all above me, all I see is mine 🎵
🎵 Can't walk me down the line of envy and see you here 🎵
🎵 Differently in the pocket of disaster, are you feeling what you remember? 🎵
🎵 You're unforgettable, you're undeniable, when you do the diabolical and see your wings fly with mine 🎵
🎵 You're unforgettable, undeniable, unbreakable inside of all that you feel, oh yeah 🎵
🎵 Don't change, don't rearrange, only put yourself in the blame of maintain
 🎵
🎵 Damn, gotta make change for you, gotta be the thing that you want me to be 🎵
🎵 so you don't forget about me 🎵
🎵
🎵 You're unforgettable, you're just cannibalizing your own dreams 🎵
🎵 You're deniable, agreeable, fake front now you know 🎵
🎵 It's just schemes in your mind, oh are you mine? 🎵
🎵 Do you mind a little change for me? Oh no, no, no, no, not for you 🎵
🎵 You're unforgettable, you're unforgettable 🎵
🎵 Baby fly, past your own line, so I remember why I'm all alone 🎵
🎵 Disaster on the phone telling me you're inner thoughts, I can see the sleep that you lack between the mes 🎵
🎵 You're unforgettable, undeniable, unquestionably you're unforgetting 🎵
🎵 Pull up your own way, please dont judge of highways 🎵
🎵 Undeniably hot and insane, too much in my main vein 🎵
🎵 Unforgettable, forget me, yeah unforgettable, I'm just trying to feel my way to the next high, yeah 🎵
Can we get high? I mean, that'd be fun. Can we? Can we?
It'd make this night unforgettable.
